Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
Features:
-Added all of Asuna's games to the plugin. Including setting up the IPC for each plugin.
-Added Roulette
-Added Scratchcards
-Added Spin the Wheel
-Added Poker
Improved Image Cache for faster loading, including a button to clear the cache in settings.
